Package org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ActivityResultIdentifiers
    Shared identifiers for activity results.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractEditorActivity<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
    This abstract activity permits to edit an document with the NetEditor API.
    FigureView<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
    This view permits to draw NetEditor figures on an Droid view.
    OpenableDocumentFileFilter
    File filter that is for all the documents openable by the editor.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    AbstractEditorActivity.DifferedActionType
    Type of differed action that may be run by the function AbstractEditorActivity.runDifferedActionAfterSaving(DifferedActionType).
